sections.sectionTitle: Ama Mite Thumanglo Napi-in in Lam Lak

verses.text: Ka mite aw, keima hilhna ngai un la, ka kam tawh ka thugente na bil uh hong ngat un
Note tungah thugentehna zangin ka kam ka-in thu ka hong gen ding hi. I pu i pate in hong gensa, eite in i zaksa leh i theihsa, tanglai-a thuthukte ka hong genkhia ding hi
Hih thute, i tate tungah eite in imloin, a hong piang lai ding khang thakte tungah, Topa' minthang nasepna, ama vangliatna, ama sepsa na lamdangte i gen ding hi

Amaute pen Pasian tungah a lungsim thumanlo, lungsim kip a neilo khangmi, lungsim khauhin a lehdo khangmi, amau' pulepate tawh kibang loin, amaute in Pasian sungah amau' lametna koihin, Pasian' nasepnate mangngilh loin, ama thupiakte zui-in, a suak nailo naupangte, a hong piangkik khang thakte in a thu thei-in, amaute ding khia-in amau' tuletate tungah a thu a gentheihna dingin, amah in, i pate in a tate a hilhsawn dinga a sawl ahi, Israel sungah thukham khat koihin, Jakob sungah tecipan'na khat a koih hi
Thal a tawi Efraim mite, galkido ni-in nungkik uh hi
Amaute in Pasian' thuciamna zuilo uh a, ama thukham bangin gamta nuamlo uh hi
Ama bawlsa leh amaute tungah na lamdang a lahsate amaute in mangngilh uh hi
Egypt gamsung Zoan munah, a pu a pate uh' muhna-ah amah in na lamdang a bawl hi
Amah in tuipi kikhensakin amaute kantansak a, tuite a lompi-in a omsak hi
Sun hunin amah in amaute meiipi khat tawh kha a, zan tawntung, meikuang taang khat tawh amaute a kha hi
Amah in gamsungah suangpite kitamsak a, tuithukpi sung panin a piangkhia bangin amaute' tungah tui dawn ding tampi a pia hi
Amah in suangpi sung panin luitui luangkhiasak a, guntui luang bangin tuite a luangsak hi
Ahi zongin ama tungah amaute khial lailai uh a, Sehnel gamsungah Sangpenpa a lehpan' uh hi
Amaute in amau' duh mahmah an a kalhna uh tawh amaute in a lungsim sung uhah Pasian a ze-et uh hi
Amaute in Pasian gensia uh a, “Pasian in gamlakah an pia thei ding ahi hiam
Amah in suangpi sat a, tui lengkhia-in tuite dimlet takpi ahi hiam? Amah in ama mite, an ahi a, sameh ahi zongin a pia thei takpi ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin hehna tawh kidimin, meikuang tawh Jakob sugawp a, Israel tungah a heh semsem hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Pasian umlo uh a, a honkhiazo dingin muanglo uh hi
Ahi zongin amah in, tunga om vantungte thu pia-in, vantung kongte hong a
nek dingin amau tungah manna an zusakin, amaute tungah vantung an a pia hi
Mihingte in vantung mite' an ne uh a, amah in amaute tungah an tampi a puak hi
Amah in vantungah nisuahna huih nungsakin, ama vangliatna tawh leitaw lam huih paikhiatpih a
amah in amaute tungah leivui zah-a tam sa zusak a, tuipi sehnel zah-a tam vasate a khiatsuk hi
Amau' giahphual laizang, amau' omna kiim khempeuhah tuate a kiasak hi
Amau' duh pen pia ahih manin, amaute in ne-in gilvah uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in a duh pen uh a kham ma, amau' kam sungah an a omlaipi mahin
amaute' tungah Pasian' hehna tungkikin amah in amaute lakah a hatpen teng thatin, Israel-te' muan'lesuan' teng a vatlum hi
Hih na lamdangte khempeuh a omkhin hinapi-in amaute khial lai veve uh a, ama na lamdangte' hangin amaute in um tuanlo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in amau' hunte husan' khat bangin maimangsak a, amau' nuntakna, launa lianpi tawh a beisak hi
Amaute pawlkhat a thah khit ciangin a omlai mite in amah zong pan uh hi. Amaute kisikin, lungsim taktak tawh Pasian a zong uh hi
Amaute in Pasian pen, amaute a honkhia, Sangpen Pasian, amaute a hupa ahihna a phawk uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in a kampi bek uh tawh amah phatkhem uh a, a leii uh tawh ama tungah zuaugen uh hi
Amaute' lungsim ama lamah kiplo uh a, ama thuciamna-ah amaute thumanlo uh hi
Ahi zongin amah in hehpihna lungsim nei ahih manin amau' khialhnate maisakin, amaute susialo hi. Amah in a hehna ip zelzel a, a hehna khempeuh phongkhialo hi
Amah in, amaute pen mihing hi lel a, a hong paikik nawnlo huihnung bang ahihna uh a phawk hi
Amaute in gamlakah amah lehdo zelzel uh a, sehnel gamsungah amah dahsak uh hi
Amaute in amah ze-et kikkik uh a, Israel-te' Siangtho Pasian a phin uh hi

Galte' kiang panin amah in amaute a hotkhiat ni hita leh, Egypt gamah ama limte a bawl hun lai hita leh, Zoan gamah a bawl a na lamdangte hita leh, ama vangliatna hita leh, amaute in ngaihsutin neilo uh hi
Amaute in a luituite uh a dawn theihlohna dingin amau' guntuite amah in sisan a suaksak hi
Amaute a petthei cippi honte, amaute' lote a susia uiphukte amau' lakah a sawl hi
Amau' lo ante tangngol pia a, amau' sepna gahte kauphe a pia hi
A leengguite uh gial tawh denggawp a, a theithekte uh vukkhal tawh susia hi
A ganhingte uh gial tawh denglum a, a gan khawite uh keek tawh a denglum hi
Amaute' tungah a lauhuai ama sinsona, hehna, thangpaihna, gimna, leh a susiathei van mi honkhat a khah hi
Amah in a sinsona iplo-in, kuamah hin'khawilo a, pulnatna tawh amaute a sisak hi
Ham' suante' innsungah a ta upa pen teng, Egypt gamsung tacil khempeuh amah in a vatmai hi
Tua ciangin amah in tua bangin ama mite gamlakah paikhiatpihin, ganhing honpi bangin amaute a paipih hi
Amah in a muan'huaina munah amaute paipih ahih manin amaute laulo uh hi. Ahih hangin tuipi in amau' galte tumcip hi
A khut taklam tawh ama ngahsa mual ahi, a gam siangtho-ah amaute a paipih hi
Amau' mai panin midangte hawlkhia-in, amaute' luah ding neihsa hawmsak a, Israel minamte amau' buk sungah a tengsak hi
Ahi zongin amaute in Sangpen Pasian ze-etin lehdo uh a, ama thupiakna zuiloin
a pu a pate uh mah bangin kiheikhia-in a zuau gamtat uh hi. Thal ginalo bangin amaute a kihuiheek uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a munsangte uh tawh amah a sinsona dingin phinphin uh a, amau' milim bawlte tawh ama hazatna ding a piangsak uh hi
Pasian in a zak ciangin heh pha mahmah a, amah in Israel-te a nial siangtho hi
Mihingte' lakah ama omna puanbuk ahi, Shiloh khua-a ama omna biakinn nusia a
ama vangliatna, galte' tungah ap a, ama minthan'na, galte' khutah a pia hi
Amah in ama mite namsau tawh sisak a, ama luahte tungah a hehna a nga hi
Mei in a tangvalte kanglum a, a nungakte' pasal ding kuamah om nawnlo hi
Amau' siampite, namsau in puksak a, amau' zite in a pasalte kah zolo uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa pen zukhamin a awng mi thahatpa, a ihmu tho bangin a khanglo hi
Amah in a langpangte zo a, a maizum tawntung dingin amaute a koih hi
Amah in Josef' suante nial a, Efraim minamte teello hi
Ahih hangin ama it Zion Mual, Judah minam a teel hi
A kip den dingin a phuhsa leitang bang leh, a vantung inn bangin ama biakinn a lam hi
Amah in ama mi Jakob, ama luah Israel a cing dingin, no a nei tuupite a cin'na, tuubukte panin la-in, ama nasem David a teel hi
Amah in lungsim thutang tawh amaute hoihtakin cingin, a siam mahmah a khut tawh amaute lam a lak hi.
